snippets.title: State persists across cells
snippets.code:
# Cell 1 (run first)
client_ready = True
total_tokens = 0

# Cell 2 (run later) - sees Cell 1's variables
total_tokens += 1280
print(total_tokens)   # 1280, because the kernel kept the state
snippets.explanation: Variables defined in an earlier-executed cell remain available to later-executed cells in the same kernel session.

snippets.title: In[n] / Out[n] and the last expression
snippets.code:
2 + 2          # Out[n]: 4  (last expression is echoed)

x = 10         # assignment produces no Out
x              # Out[n]: 10
snippets.explanation: Only the final expression of a cell is displayed as Out[n]; assignments show nothing.

snippets.title: Inspecting kernel state
snippets.code:
%whos          # list variables currently in the kernel
# Kernel menu: Restart & Run All -> verifies a clean top-to-bottom run
snippets.explanation: %whos reveals what the kernel is holding; Restart & Run All proves the notebook is reproducible.
